beats.narrative: Player wakes in the starter village — stone-floored homes ringed by green grass. jan Sewi stands at the village center; jan Pona lingers in the upper plaza; jan Telo leans against the well. Walking up to jan Sewi fires the four-beat starter ceremony (toki / poki / wan / wawa) and offers the three starters: soweli_seli, soweli_telo, kasi_pona. Picking one sets starter_chosen, drops three poki_lili, adds the chosen creature to the party at level 5. Until starter_chosen is true the eastern warp is non-interactive.

Long path-route east-to-west, framed by trees. Three tall_grass rectangles host the player's first encounters: pipi_kon, akesi_ma, kala_lili in the level 3-7 band — first chance to throw a poki_lili. Halfway along a sign reads 'the path was narrow.' At the eastern edge stands jan Ike, the rival, with soweli_seli at level 5 and two starter moves. Defeating him (or losing — losses restore the party at the last village) opens the eastern warp.

Mountain pass — stone footpaths between rocks and tall_grass clumps. Encounters skew wawa-ish and high-altitude: waso_sewi, soweli_lete, pipi_kiwen. jan Kala the hiker sits along the path catching her breath, teaches lete ahead of the next region. At the top, jan Wawa — the strong-master and first jan lawa — blocks the northward path with a two-creature gym fight: waso_sewi at level 8 then soweli_lete at level 10. Winning sets badge_sewi and grants the reward word sewi.

Round village built on a stone island in the middle of a lake. No tall grass, no random encounters — a story-and-shop beat. jan Telo (first met at the well in ma_tomo_lili) is now revealed as the jan lawa of ma_telo with kala_suli at level 10 and kasi_pona at level 12 — a deliberate type wrinkle that punishes one-typed parties. Beating him sets badge_telo and grants telo. jan Kala sits at the lake's edge with a small lost-something quest stub. jan Moku runs a lakeside stall.

Cold-land village. Stone ground with patches of grass_detail (the local tall-grass key), bordered by snow-laden trees and a fenced herb garden. Encounter table mixes waso_lete, soweli_lete_suli (the big bear's first appearance), kasi_pona, soweli_suwi, levels 7-12. jan Lete the jan lawa fields waso_lete level 10 and soweli_lete_suli level 13 — first gym where a player without a seli creature feels real friction. jan Anpa watches the snow from her doorstep; jan Kasi tends the garden. Beating jan Lete sets badge_lete and grants lete.

The great peak — hardest gym before the endgame. Tall narrow map, stone everywhere, sparse tall-grass patches around rocky outcrops. Encounters are heavy birds and the bear: waso_suli (the eagle), waso_sewi, soweli_lete_suli at higher levels (10-15). jan Suli waits at the upper shrine with waso_sewi level 12 (utala_lili + wawa_waso + kon_wawa) and soweli_lete_suli level 14 (utala + lete_wawa + lete_suli). jan pi kon meditates on a rock teaching kon; jan pi nasin asks which way is down, teaching nasin. Beating jan Suli sets badge_suli and grants suli — the canonical 'you are ready' moment.

Endgame approach. Long riverside route — wide grassy west bank, deep water channel down the east side, scattered tall-grass clumps. Heavily aquatic encounters: kala_lili, kala_telo, waso_telo, soweli_telo, kala_suli at the highest levels yet (7-13). jan Kala Suli is a veteran fisher who offers an optional XP-only fight (kala_suli level 10 + kala_telo level 11) — a tune-up before the final boss. jan Kala Lili is cheerful flavor. jan Moku Pona grills river fish at a cart. jan Olin Telo speaks quietly about the water. With all four region badges in hand, walking onto the eastern final_boss_trigger fires the green-dragon cutscene + final fight; the dragon's dedicated death animation is reserved for this beat.
